TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Fulufuluan = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang Fulufuluan. 2,180 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 5,725 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 348 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 5,377 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis5%, Truku1%. Pusu nniqan alang Bgurah na alang ka alang Fulufuluan nii. Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Ci-an alang Fulufuluan. Gasuc Ti-ri lnglingay. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung Mgrig rulu: Taypey>kwo-taw 3 haw>Nan-cow cyaw-ryow-taw>Sng-ri ru>Ta-tung ru>Ping-er kung-ru>Tay1>Cyow-cwang ru>Nan-hwey kung-ru>Tay-ma-ri cyey>Tung64>Dhuq. Pusu klegan seejiq nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis ni Tlu. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Teyeynskiyo. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw ‚óŹSaan rmigaw Sng-an kung 03-8532775 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Ci-an alang Fulufuluan C-hwey 3 cyey 118 haw. Pnyahan alang Alang Fulufuluan kndadax kkrayan brigun ka dxgal hini do kika pnhiyug kingal bgurah alang da.
S.PHON: = *ulu*uluan = gaga mniq ńßwa…ĺ…ôs…ôn ¶iansjaŇč ka alaŇč *ulu*uluan. *,*** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *,*** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis*%, t…ĺuku*%. pusu nniqan alaŇč bgu…ĺańß na alaŇč ka alaŇč *ulu*uluan nii. nniqan alaŇč njusan skanki nsgan ¶i-an alaŇč *ulu*uluan. gasu ¶ ti-…ĺi lŇčliŇčaj. pgkla patas ¶jaw-tuŇč mg…ĺig …ĺulu: tajp…ô>kwo-taw * ńßaw>nan- ¶ow ¶jaw-…ĺjow-taw>sŇč-…ĺi …ĺu>ta-tuŇč …ĺu>piŇč-…ô…ĺ kuŇč-…ĺu>taj*> ¶jow- ¶waŇč …ĺu>nan-ńßw…ô kuŇč-…ĺu>taj-ma-…ĺi ¶j…ô>tuŇč**>dńßuq. pusu kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč amis. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi amis ni tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw pn…ĺńßulan …üo…ĺo ni t…ô…ônskijo. pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw *saan …ĺmigaw sŇč-an kuŇč **-******* njusan skanki nsgan ¶i-an alaŇč *ulu*uluan ¶-ńßw…ô * ¶j…ô *** ńßaw. pnjańßan alaŇč alaŇč *ulu*uluan kndadax kk…ĺajan b…ĺigun ka dxgal ńßini do kika pnńßijug kiŇčal bgu…ĺańß alaŇč da.
S.FORM: = Fulufuluan = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang Fulufuluan. 2,180 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 5,725 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 348 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 5,377 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis5%, Truku1%. Pusu nniqan alang Bgurah na alang ka alang Fulufuluan nii. Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Ci-an alang Fulufuluan. Gasuc Ti-ri lnglingay. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung Mgrig rulu: Taypey>kwo-taw 3 haw>Nan-cow cyaw-ryow-taw>Sng-ri ru>Ta-tung ru>Ping-er kung-ru>Tay1>Cyow-cwang ru>Nan-hwey kung-ru>Tay-ma-ri cyey>Tung64>Dhuq. Pusu klegan seejiq nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis ni Tlu. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Teyeynskiyo. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw ‚óŹSaan rmigaw Sng-an kung 03-8532775 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Ci-an alang Fulufuluan C-hwey 3 cyey 118 haw. Pnyahan alang Alang Fulufuluan kndadax kkrayan brigun ka dxgal hini do kika pnhiyug kingal bgurah alang da.
S.PHON: = *ulu*uluan = gaga mniq ńßwa…ĺ…ôs…ôn ¶iansjaŇč ka alaŇč *ulu*uluan. *,*** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *,*** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis*%, t…ĺuku*%. pusu nniqan alaŇč bgu…ĺańß na alaŇč ka alaŇč *ulu*uluan nii. nniqan alaŇč njusan skanki nsgan ¶i-an alaŇč *ulu*uluan. gasu ¶ ti-…ĺi lŇčliŇčaj. pgkla patas ¶jaw-tuŇč mg…ĺig …ĺulu: tajp…ô>kwo-taw * ńßaw>nan- ¶ow ¶jaw-…ĺjow-taw>sŇč-…ĺi …ĺu>ta-tuŇč …ĺu>piŇč-…ô…ĺ kuŇč-…ĺu>taj*> ¶jow- ¶waŇč …ĺu>nan-ńßw…ô kuŇč-…ĺu>taj-ma-…ĺi ¶j…ô>tuŇč**>dńßuq. pusu kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč amis. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi amis ni tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw pn…ĺńßulan …üo…ĺo ni t…ô…ônskijo. pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw *saan …ĺmigaw sŇč-an kuŇč **-******* njusan skanki nsgan ¶i-an alaŇč *ulu*uluan ¶-ńßw…ô * ¶j…ô *** ńßaw. pnjańßan alaŇč alaŇč *ulu*uluan kndadax kk…ĺajan b…ĺigun ka dxgal ńßini do kika pnńßijug kiŇčal bgu…ĺańß alaŇč da.
